message.content:
Apply NinjaPromo design system to these pages. READ each file first, then EDIT them.

The NinjaPromo design system uses these CSS classes (already defined in index.html):
- `.ninja-card` — bg-#111111, border rgba(255,255,255,0.08), rounded-1rem, hover purple glow
- `.gradient-text` — gradient text from indigo to purple to pink
- `.btn-gradient` — pill gradient button (purple), rounded-full
- `.gradient-border` — card with gradient border via ::before pseudo-element

Design patterns:
- Background: pure black (#000000)
- Cards: use `ninja-card` class
- Buttons: pill shape (rounded-full), primary uses `btn-gradient`, secondary uses `border border-white/[0.08] bg-white/[0.04] rounded-full`
- Typography: large bold font-sans headings, `gradient-text` on accent words
- Borders: border-white/[0.06] or border-white/[0.08]
- Spacing: generous (p-8 for cards)
- Text: white headings, gray-500 body, purple-400 accents
- Inputs: bg-[#111111] border border-white/[0.08] rounded-xl

Files to update:

1. `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\Analyze.tsx`
   - Form container: ninja-card with p-8
   - Input fields: bg-[#111111] border-white/[0.08] rounded-xl
   - Primary button: btn-gradient rounded-full
   - Title: gradient-text on accent words

2. `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\Results.tsx`
   - Category cards container
   - Action buttons: rounded-full pill style
   - Download/Share buttons: border-white/[0.08] bg-white/[0.04] rounded-full
   - Title with gradient-text
   - Replace glass-panel with ninja-card where appropriate

Make careful edits to preserve ALL existing functionality. Only change styling classes, not logic.

content.text: Now let me verify the final state of both files to confirm everything looks correct.

Both files look correct. All logic is preserved and only styling classes were changed. Let me provide a summary of all changes made.

---

Here is a summary of all the NinjaPromo design system changes applied:

## `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\Analyze.tsx`

**Badge/pill tag** (line 23):
- Changed from `bg-primary/10 border border-primary/20 text-primary` to `bg-white/[0.04] border border-white/[0.08] text-purple-400` -- NinjaPromo secondary pill style with subtle white borders.

**Title heading** (line 27-29):
- Changed `font-serif` to `font-sans` (NinjaPromo uses bold sans headings).
- Wrapped "visibilite IA" in `<span className="gradient-text">` for the accent gradient effect.

**Description text** (line 30):
- Changed `text-gray-400` to `text-gray-500` per the NinjaPromo body text convention.

**Form container** (line 38):
- Replaced the inline glass-style div (`bg-purple-500/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl`) with `ninja-card p-8` -- the core NinjaPromo card class with generous padding.

**Input field** (line 45):
- Applied `bg-[#111111] border border-white/[0.08] rounded-xl` -- the NinjaPromo input style.

**Primary button** (line 53):
- Replaced the inline gradient (`bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-500 to-violet-600 rounded-xl`) with `btn-gradient` -- the NinjaPromo pill gradient button class (which includes `rounded-full` and the proper purple gradient).

**Trust indicators** (line 63):
- Changed TrendingUp icon color from `text-accent` to `text-purple-400` for consistency with NinjaPromo purple accent convention.

## `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\Results.tsx`

**Page title** (line 101):
- Changed `font-serif` to `font-sans`.
- Wrapped the hostname in `<span className="gradient-text">` for the NinjaPromo accent gradient.

**"New audit" primary button** (line 108):
- Replaced `bg-primary hover:bg-primaryDark text-black font-bold rounded-xl shadow-lg shadow-primary/20` with `btn-gradient ... text-white font-bold` -- using the NinjaPromo pill gradient button.

**Section heading** (line 119):
- Changed `font-medium` to `font-sans font-semibold`.
- Wrapped "detaillee" in `<span className="gradient-text">` for the accent gradient.

**Share button** (line 123):
- Replaced `bg-purple-500/5 border border-white/10 hover:bg-purple-500/10 rounded-lg` with `border border-white/[0.08] bg-white/[0.04] hover:bg-white/[0.08] rounded-full` -- NinjaPromo secondary pill button style.

**Download/PDF button** (line 130):
- Replaced `bg-primary/10 border border-primary/20 hover:bg-primary/20 rounded-lg text-primary` with `border border-white/[0.08] bg-white/[0.04] hover:bg-white/[0.08] rounded-full text-purple-400` -- NinjaPromo secondary pill button with purple text accent.

**PDF report container** (lines 152-321):
- Left completely untouched. This is a hidden off-screen element used only for PDF generation with a white background, and applying the dark NinjaPromo theme to it would break the PDF output.

All existing functionality (form submission, URL validation, PDF export, share, navigation, conditional rendering, state management) is fully preserved. Only CSS/styling classes on visible UI elements were modified.
